description: Cleerly Runbook: Identify and restart unhealthy EKS pods in production namespace

DeploymentName.description: Name of the Kubernetes deployment to restart

AutomationAssumeRole.description: IAM role for SSM Automation execution

inputs.Script:
def restart(events, context):
    import subprocess
    subprocess.run(
        ['kubectl', 'rollout', 'restart',
         'deployment/' + events['Deployment'],
         '-n', events['Namespace']],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['kubectl', 'rollout', 'status',
         'deployment/' + events['Deployment'],
         '-n', events['Namespace'], '--timeout=300s'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    return {'status': result.stdout, 'success': result.returncode == 0}
